task: Open the form 8843 for tax year 2022.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated on IRS.gov to the prior forms search results, found the entry labeled “2022 Form 8843, Statement for Exempt Individuals and Individuals with a Medical Condition,” clicked it, and opened the PDF at https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-prior/f8843--2022.pdf. The final snapshot shows the PDF viewer loaded with title text “2022 Form 8843,” confirming the requested form for tax year 2022 was opened.
final_result_response: Done. I opened the IRS 2022 Form 8843 PDF.
action_history: Opening IRS website: const irsPage1 = await openTab('https://www.irs.gov/');
Searching IRS for 2022 Form 8843: await page.locator('e18').fill('2022 Form 8843');
Searching IRS for 2022 Form 8843: await page.locator('e19').click();
Opening IRS forms search: await page.locator('e41').click();
